3083: The dream you and I once saw has become something we all share
18300: Meeting you was like entering the starting gate (Ready? Go!)
22200:
We raced ahead, not knowing anything
Not even our right from left
27333: I know I can trust your honest heart to keep me going (Fight on!)
31283: So we ran on, day by day, until we reached who we are today
36167:
But the more I run, the more I think
Of this one little thing
40700:
I worry I don't have what it will take
To reach my far-off goal
45383:
But the more I run, the more I'm sure
Of this one little thing
50200:
No matter what race I'm running in
I know I'm not the only one
56933: Beyond our dazzling dreams lie even more aspirations
61617:
The more ambitions you decide to pursue,
The more gates will open for you
66300:
Hear the crowd call your name, take that first step
Make your dreams come true
71283: Hearing your rousing cheers (I have nothing to fear)
73617: Hearing those words you said (Showed me the path ahead)
75967:
The dreams we share don't end
They continue on, far out of view
92067: I want to set my sights so high, it's like I'm gazing at the sky
96750:
Many adventures start off as something small, like one
little prayer
101433: Get ready for a miracle, a magical change in the air
106400: Trust all your hopes to me (I'll carry them dearly)
108750: Let all your dreams run free (Show you all we could be)
111083: Soon you'll feel tremors in your heart and throughout the world
116067: With these powerful legs, we'll blast ahead
